description: guess watches are creative masterpieces with absolute durability. They have proven themselves in the art of creating high quality timepieces, by combining the epitome of style with impeccable technology. The new range of watches are a fresh take on perfection and are great for urban wear. Case diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel and a white leather strap guess logo at the 12 hour mark Tang clasp with a white dial, metallic numbers and metallic hands Date slot across the 2 to 4 hour mark Three chronograph time displays with hours, minutes and seconds for easy reading of time Polished hands to mark sub dials Screw to reset time, alarm and set the timer Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
